vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The Simple Network Management Protocol (SNMP) subsystem of Cisco IOS and IOS XE contains a vulnerability that could allow an authenticated, remote attacker to remotely execute code on an affected system or cause an affected system to reload.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS and IOS XE Software SNMP Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The Simple Network Management Protocol (SNMP) subsystem of Cisco IOS and IOS XE contains a vulnerability that could allow an authenticated, remote attacker to remotely execute code.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS and IOS XE Software SNMP Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The Simple Network Management Protocol (SNMP) subsystem of Cisco IOS and IOS XE contains a vulnerability that could allow an authenticated, remote attacker to remotely execute code.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS and IOS XE Software SNMP Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The Simple Network Management Protocol (SNMP) subsystem of Cisco IOS and IOS XE contains a vulnerability that could allow an authenticated, remote attacker to remotely execute code.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS Software and Cisco IOS XE Software Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A vulnerability in the Autonomic Networking feature of Cisco IOS Software and Cisco IOS XE Software could allow an unauthenticated, adjacent attacker to cause autonomic nodes of an affected system to reload, resulting in denial-of-service (DoS).

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS Software and Cisco IOS XE Software UDP Packet Processing Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A vulnerability in the UDP processing code of Cisco IOS and IOS XE could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to cause the input queue of an affected system to hold UDP packets, causing an interface queue wedge and denial of service.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS XE Software Ethernet Virtual Private Network Border Gateway Protocol Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A vulnerability in the Border Gateway Protocol (BGP) over an Ethernet Virtual Private Network (EVPN) for Cisco IOS XE Software could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to cause the device to reload, resulting in a denial of service (DoS) condition, or potentially corrupt the BGP routing table, which could result in network instability.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS and IOS XE Software DHCP Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The Dynamic Host Configuration Protocol (DHCP) relay subsystem of Cisco IOS and Cisco IOS XE Software contains a vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to execute arbitrary code and gain full control of an affected system.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco Catalyst 6800 Series Switches VPLS Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A vulnerability in the Virtual Private LAN Service (VPLS) code of Cisco IOS for Cisco Catalyst 6800 Series Switches could allow an unauthenticated, adjacent attacker to cause a denial of service.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS and IOS XE Software Internet Key Exchange Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A vulnerability in the Internet Key Exchange Version 2 (IKEv2) module of Cisco IOS and Cisco IOS XE could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to cause high CPU utilization, traceback messages, or a reload of an affected device that leads to a denial of service.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS Software for Cisco Industrial Ethernet Switches PROFINET Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A vulnerability in the implementation of the PROFINET Discovery and Configuration Protocol (PN-DCP) for Cisco IOS could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to cause an affected device to reload, resulting in a denial of service.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS Software Common Industrial Protocol Request Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: There is a vulnerability in the implementation of the Common Industrial Protocol (CIP) feature in Cisco IOS could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to cause an affected device to reload, resulting in a denial of service.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS Software Common Industrial Protocol Request Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: There is a vulnerability in the implementation of the Common Industrial Protocol (CIP) feature in Cisco IOS could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to cause an affected device to reload, resulting in a denial of service.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS Software for Cisco Integrated Services Routers Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A vulnerability in the implementation of a protocol in Cisco Integrated Services Routers Generation 2 (ISR G2) Routers running Cisco IOS could allow an unauthenticated, adjacent attacker to cause an affected device to reload, resulting in a denial of service.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS Software Network Address Translation Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A vulnerability in the implementation of Network Address Translation (NAT) functionality in Cisco IOS could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to cause a denial of service.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Office Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in Microsoft Office software when the software fails to properly handle objects in memory. An attacker who successfully exploited the vulnerability could run arbitrary code in the context of the current user.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Flash Player Type Confusion Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Adobe Flash Player contains a type confusion vulnerability which can allow for remote code execution.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: The impacted product is end-of-life and should be disconnected if still in use.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Office Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Office contains a use-after-free vulnerability which can allow for remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Graphics Device Interface (GDI) Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The Graphics Device Interface (GDI) in Microsoft Windows Vista SP2; Windows Server 2008 SP2 and R2 SP1; Windows 7 SP1; Windows 8.1; Windows Server 2012 Gold and R2; Windows RT 8.1; and Windows 10 Gold, 1511, and 1607 allows local users to gain privileges

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Siemens SIMATIC CP 1543-1 Improper Privilege Management Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: An improper privilege management vulnerability exists within the Siemens SIMATIC Communication Processor (CP) that allows a privileged attacker to remotely cause a denial of service.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Flash Player Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Use-after-free vulnerability in Adobe Flash Player Windows and OS and Linux allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: The impacted product is end-of-life and should be disconnected if still in use.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Office Security Feature Bypass Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A security feature bypass vulnerability exists when Microsoft Office improperly handles input. An attacker who successfully exploited the vulnerability could execute arbitrary commands.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Office Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Office contains a memory corruption vulnerability which can allow for remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Linux Kernel Race Condition Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Race condition in mm/gup.c in the Linux kernel allows local users to escalate privileges.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Flash Player Arbitrary Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: An access of resource using incompatible type vulnerability exists within Adobe Flash Player that allows an attacker to perform remote code execution.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: The impacted product is end-of-life and should be disconnected if still in use.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Flash Player Arbitrary Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Adobe Flash Player allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service or possibly execute arbitrary code.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: The impacted product is end-of-life and should be disconnected if still in use.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Secondary Logon Service Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A privilege escalation vulnerability exists in Microsoft Windows if the Windows Secondary Logon Service fails to properly manage request handles in memory. An attacker who successfully exploited this vulnerability could run arbitrary code as an administrator.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Flash Player Arbitrary Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Adobe Flash Player allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted SWF file.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: The impacted product is end-of-life and should be disconnected if still in use.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Flash Player Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A use-after-free vulnerability exists within the ActionScript 3 ByteArray class in Adobe Flash Player that allows an attacker to perform remote code execution.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: The impacted product is end-of-life and should be disconnected if still in use.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Oracle Java SE Integrity Check Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Unspecified vulnerability in Oracle Java SE allows remote attackers to affect integrity via Unknown vectors related to deployment.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Flash Player Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A memory corruption vulnerability exists in Adobe Flash Player that allows an attacker to perform remote code execution.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: The impacted product is end-of-life and should be disconnected if still in use.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Oracle Java SE and Java SE Embedded Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: An unspecified vulnerability exists within Oracle Java Runtime Environment that allows an attacker to perform remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Office Malformed EPS File Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Office allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted EPS image.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft PowerPoint Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft PowerPoint allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code or cause a denial of service (memory corruption) via a crafted Office document.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft ATM Font Driver Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: ATMFD.DLL in the Adobe Type Manager Font Driver in Microsoft Windows Server allows local users to gain privileges via a crafted application.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Win32k Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: An unspecified vulnerability exists in the Win32k.sys kernel-mode driver in Microsoft Windows Server that allows a local attacker to execute arbitrary code with elevated privileges.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Office Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Office contains a memory corruption vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted document.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Object Linking & Embedding (OLE) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A vulnerability exists in Windows Object Linking & Embedding (OLE) that could allow remote code execution if a user opens a file that contains a specially crafted OLE object.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Reader and Acrobat Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Adobe Reader and Acrobat contain a use-after-free vulnerability which can allow for code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Kernel Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Windows NDProxy.sys in the kernel contains an improper input validation vulnerability which can allow a local attacker to escalate privileges.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Internet Explorer Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A use-after-free vulnerability exists within CDisplayPointer in Microsoft Internet Explorer that allows an attacker to remotely execute arbitrary code.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Reader and Acrobat Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Adobe Reader and Acrobat contain a memory corruption vulnerability which can allow attackers to execute arbitrary code or cause a denial of service.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Mozilla Firefox Information Disclosure Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Mozilla Firefox does not properly initialize data structures for the nsDOMSVGZoomEvent::mPreviousScale and nsDOMSVGZoomEvent::mNewScale functions, which allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive information from process memory via a crafted web site.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Internet Explorer Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: This vulnerability may corrupt memory in a way that could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary code in the context of the current user within Internet Explorer.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Reader Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A buffer overflow vulnerability exists in Adobe Reader which allows an attacker to perform remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Reader and Acrobat Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: An memory corruption vulnerability exists in the acroform.dll in Adobe Reader that allows an attacker to perform remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe ColdFusion Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: An authentication bypass vulnerability exists in Adobe ColdFusion which could result in an unauthorized user gaining administrative access.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Oracle Java SE Runtime Environment (JRE) Arbitrary Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The Java Runtime Environment (JRE) component in Oracle Java SE allow for remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Office MSCOMCTL.OCX Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The TabStrip ActiveX control in the Common Controls in MSCOMCTL.OCX in Microsoft Office allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted (1) document or (2) web page that triggers system-state corruption.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Oracle Java SE Runtime Environment (JRE) Arbitrary Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Unspecified vulnerability in the Java Runtime Environment (JRE) component in Oracle Java SE allows remote attackers to affect confidentiality, integrity, and availability via Unknown vectors related to Hotspot.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Flash Player Arbitrary Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Unspecified vulnerability in Adobe Flash Player allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code or cause a denial of service via crafted SWF content.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: The impacted product is end-of-life and should be disconnected if still in use.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Oracle Java SE Runtime Environment (JRE) Arbitrary Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: An incorrect type vulnerability exists in the Concurrency component of Oracle's Java Runtime Environment allows an attacker to remotely execute arbitrary code.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Oracle Java SE Runtime Environment (JRE) Arbitrary Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: An access control vulnerability exists in the Applet Rhino Script Engine component of Oracle's Java Runtime Environment allows an attacker to remotely execute arbitrary code.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Forefront TMG Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in the Forefront Threat Management Gateway (TMG) Firewall Client Winsock provider that could allow code execution in the security context of the client application.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Flash Player Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Adobe Flash Player contains a vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code or cause a denial of service (application crash) via crafted Flash content.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: The impacted product is end-of-life and should be disconnected if still in use.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Office Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in the parsing of RTF data in Microsoft Office and earlier allows an attacker to perform remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Kernel Exception Handler Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The kernel in Microsoft Windows, when access to 16-bit applications is enabled on a 32-bit x86 platform, does not properly validate certain BIOS calls, which allows local users to gain privileges.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Reader and Acrobat Arbitrary Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Unspecified vulnerability in Adobe Reader and Acrobat allows attackers to cause a denial of service or possibly execute arbitrary code.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Excel Featheader Record Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Office Excel allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a spreadsheet with a FEATHEADER record containing an invalid cbHdrData size element that affects a pointer offset.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The kernel in Microsoft Windows does not properly validate changes to unspecified kernel objects, which allows local users to gain privileges via a crafted application.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Oracle VirtualBox Insufficient Input Validation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: An input validation vulnerability exists in the VBoxDrv.sys driver of Sun xVM VirtualBox which allows attackers to locally execute arbitrary code.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Reader and Acrobat Input Validation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Adobe Acrobat and Reader contain an input validation issue in a JavaScript method that could potentially lead to remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A privilege elevation vulnerability exists in the POSIX subsystem. This vulnerability could allow a logged on user to take complete control of the system.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: smss.exe debugging subsystem in Microsoft Windows does not properly authenticate programs that connect to other programs, which allows local users to gain administrator or SYSTEM privileges.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Synacor Zimbra Collaborate Suite (ZCS) Cross-Site Scripting Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) contains a cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Calendar feature that allows an attacker to execute arbitrary code.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Office Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in Microsoft Office software when it fails to properly handle objects in memory.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Internet Explorer Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A remote code execution vulnerability exists when Internet Explorer improperly accesses objects in memory.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Code Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Windows allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted OLE object.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Zabbix Frontend Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Unsafe client-side session storage leading to authentication bypass/instance takeover via Zabbix Frontend with configured SAML.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Zabbix Frontend Improper Access Control Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Malicious actors can pass step checks and potentially change the configuration of Zabbix Frontend.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Adobe Commerce and Magento Open Source contain an improper input validation vulnerability which can allow for arbitrary code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Google Chromium Animation Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Google Chromium Animation contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Internet Explorer Type Confusion Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in the way that the scripting engine handles objects in memory in Internet Explorer

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows VBScript Engine Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in the way that the VBScript engine handles objects in memory, aka "Windows VBScript Engine Remote Code Execution"

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: WinRAR Absolute Path Traversal Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: WinRAR Absolute Path Traversal vulnerability leads to Remote Code Execution

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Flash Player Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Adobe Flash Player com.adobe.tvsdk.mediacore.metadata Use After Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: The impacted product is end-of-life and should be disconnected if still in use.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: PHPUnit Command Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: PHPUnit allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via HTTP POST data beginning with a "<?php " substring, as demonstrated by an attack on a site with an exposed /vendor folder, i.e., external access to the /vendor/phpunit/phpunit/src/Util/PHP/eval-stdin.php URI.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Word Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Word contains a memory corruption vulnerability which when exploited could allow for remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Graphics Component Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Graphics Component contains a memory corruption vulnerability which can allow for remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and macOS Webkit Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and macOS WebKit contain a use-after-free vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows SAM Local Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: If a Volume Shadow Copy (VSS) shadow copy of the system drive is available, users can read the SAM file which would allow any user to escalate privileges to SYSTEM level.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft SMBv3 Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in the way that the Microsoft Server Message Block 3.1.1 (SMBv3) protocol handles certain requests. An attacker who successfully exploited the vulnerability could gain the ability to execute code on the target server or client.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Jenkins Stapler Web Framework Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A code execution vulnerability exists in the Stapler web framework used by Jenkins

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Struts 1 Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The Struts 1 plugin in Apache Struts might allow remote code execution via a malicious field value passed in a raw message to the ActionMessage.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Shell (.lnk) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Windows Shell in multiple versions of Microsoft Windows allows local users or remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted .LNK file

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Oracle Corporation WebLogic Server Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Oracle Corporation WebLogic Server contains a vulnerability that allows for remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Win32k Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Win32k contains a privilege escalation vulnerability due to the Windows kernel-mode driver failing to properly handle objects in memory.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Office Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in Microsoft Office.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft SMBv1 Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The SMBv1 server in multiple Microsoft Windows versions allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via crafted packets.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft SMBv1 Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The SMBv1 server in multiple Microsoft Windows versions allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via crafted packets.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache ActiveMQ Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The Fileserver web application in Apache ActiveMQ allows remote attackers to upload and execute arbitrary files via an HTTP PUT followed by an HTTP MOVE request

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: D-Link DIR-645 Router Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: D-Link DIR-645 Wired/Wireless Router allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands via a GetDeviceSettings action to the HNAP interface.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: The impacted product is end-of-life and should be disconnected if still in use.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft HTTP.sys Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft HTTP protocol stack (HTTP.sys) contains a vulnerability that allows for remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple OS X Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The XPC implementation in Admin Framework in Apple OS X before 10.10.3 allows local users to bypass authentication and obtain admin privileges.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple OS X Heap-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Heap-based buffer overflow in IOHIDFamily in Apple OS X, which affects, iOS before 8 and Apple TV before 7, allows attackers to execute arbitrary code in a privileged context.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Win32k Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Win32k contains an unspecified vulnerability that allows for privilege escalation.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple IOMobileFrameBuffer contains a memory corruption vulnerability which can allow a malicious application to execute arbitrary code with kernel privileges.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: SonicWall SMA 100 Appliances Stack-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: SonicWall SMA 100 devies are vulnerable to an unauthenticated stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability where exploitation can result in code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Grandstream Networks UCM6200 Series SQL Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Grandstream UCM6200 series is vulnerable to an unauthenticated remote SQL injection via crafted HTTP request. Exploitation can allow for code execution as root.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Background Intelligent Transfer Service (BITS) Improper Privilege Management Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Windows BITS is vulnerable to to a privilege elevation vulnerability if it improperly handles symbolic links. An actor can exploit this vulnerability to execute arbitrary code with system-level privileges.

vulnerabilities.product: Active Management Technology (AMT), Small Business Technology (SBT), and Standard Manageability
vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Intel Active Management Technology (AMT), Small Business Technology (SBT), and Standard Manageability Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Intel products contain a vulnerability which can allow attackers to perform privilege escalation.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Internet Explorer Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Internet Explorer contains a memory corruption vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute code in the context of the current user.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: GNU Bourne-Again Shell (Bash) Arbitrary Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: GNU Bash through 4.3 processes trailing strings after function definitions in the values of environment variables, which allows remote attackers to execute code.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: GNU Bourne-Again Shell (Bash) Arbitrary Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: GNU Bash through 4.3 processes trailing strings after function definitions in the values of environment variables, which allows remote attackers to execute code. This CVE correctly remediates the vulnerability in CVE-2014-6271.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Struts 1 ActionForm Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: ActionForm in Apache Struts versions before 1.2.9 with BeanUtils 1.7 contains a vulnerability that allows for denial-of-service (DoS).

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Struts 2 Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The ExceptionDelegator component in Apache Struts 2 before 2.2.3.1 contains an improper input validation vulnerability that allows for remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Win32k Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Windows Win32k contains a vulnerability that allows an attacker to escalate privileges.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: SolarWinds Serv-U Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: SolarWinds Serv-U versions 15.2.5 and earlier contain an improper input validation vulnerability that allows attackers to build and send queries without sanitization.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: October CMS Improper Authentication
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: In affected versions of the october/system package an attacker can request an account password reset and then gain access to the account using a specially crafted request.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Nagios XI OS Command Injection
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Nagios XI contains a vulnerability which can lead to OS command injection on the Nagios XI server.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Nagios XI OS Command Injection
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Nagios XI contains a vulnerability which can lead to OS command injection on the Nagios XI server.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Nagios XI OS Command Injection
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Nagios XI contains a vulnerability which can lead to OS command injection on the Nagios XI server.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Aviatrix Controller Unrestricted Upload of File
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Unrestricted upload of a file with a dangerous type is possible, which allows an unauthenticated user to execute arbitrary code via directory traversal.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Exchange Server Information Disclosure
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Exchange Server contains an information disclosure vulnerability which can allow an unauthenticated attacker to steal email traffic from target.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: VMware Server Side Request Forgery in vRealize Operations Manager API
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Server Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in vRealize Operations Manager API prior to 8.4 may allow a malicious actor with network access to the vRealize Operations Manager API to perform a SSRF attack to steal administrative credentials.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: System Information Library for Node.JS Command Injection
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: In this vulnerability, an attacker can send a malicious payload that will exploit the name parameter. After successful exploitation, attackers can execute remote.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: F5 BIG-IP Traffic Management Microkernel Buffer Overflow
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The Traffic Management Microkernel of BIG-IP ASM Risk Engine has a buffer overflow vulnerability, leading to a bypassing of URL-based access controls.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Oracle Business Intelligence Enterprise Edition Path Transversal
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Path traversal vulnerability, where an attacker can target the preview FilePath parameter of the getPreviewImage function to get access to arbitrary system file.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Drupal core Un-restricted Upload of File
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Improper sanitization in the extension file names is present in Drupal core.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Airflow Command Injection
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A remote code/command injection vulnerability was discovered in one of the example DAGs shipped with Airflow.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Airflow's Experimental API Authentication Bypass
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The previous default setting for Airflow's Experimental API was to allow all API requests without authentication.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: VMware vCenter Server Improper Access Control
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Rhttproxy as used in vCenter Server contains a vulnerability due to improper implementation of URI normalization.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Hikvision Improper Input Validation
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A command injection vulnerability in the web server of some Hikvision product. Due to the insufficient input validation.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Google Chrome Media Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Google Chrome Media contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to execute code via a crafted HTML page.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Win32k Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A privilege escalation vulnerability exists in Windows when the Win32k component fails to properly handle objects in memory, aka 'Win32k EoP.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft WinVerifyTrust function Remote Code Execution
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in the way that the WinVerifyTrust function handles Windows Authenticode signature verification for PE files.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Oracle WebLogic Server, Injection
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Injection vulnerability in the Oracle WebLogic Server component of Oracle Fusion Middleware (subcomponent: Web Services).

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Synacor Zimbra Collaboration Suite (ZCS) contains an improper restriction of XML external entity (XXE) vulnerability in the mailboxd component.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Fortinet FortiOS and FortiProxy Improper Authorization
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: An Improper Authorization vulnerability in Fortinet FortiOS and FortiProxy under SSL VPN web portal allows an unauthenticated attacker to modify the password.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Fortinet FortiOS and FortiProxy Out-of-bounds Write
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A heap buffer overflow in Fortinet FortiOS and FortiProxy may cause the SSL VPN web service termination for logged in users.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Remote Code Execution in PAN-OS with GlobalProtect Portal or GlobalProtect Gateway Interface enabled.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Exim Mail Transfer Agent (MTA) Improper Input Validation
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Improper validation of recipient address in deliver_message() function in /src/deliver.c may lead to remote command execution.

vulnerabilities.product: WebSphere Application Server and Server Hypervisor Edition
vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: IBM WebSphere Application Server and Server Hypervisor Edition Code Injection.
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Serialized-object interfaces in certain IBM analytics, business solutions, cognitive, IT infrastructure, and mobile and social products allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Primetek Primefaces Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Primetek Primefaces is vulnerable to a weak encryption flaw resulting in remote code execution

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Kibana Arbitrary Code Execution
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Kibana contain an arbitrary code execution flaw in the Timelion visualizer.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: FatPipe WARP, IPVPN, and MPVPN Configuration Upload exploit
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A vulnerability in the web management interface of FatPipe WARP, IPVPN, and MPVPN software allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to upload a file to any location on the filesystem.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows AppX Installer Spoofing Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Microsoft Windows AppX Installer contains a spoofing vulnerability which has a high impacts to confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Google Chromium V8 Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Google Chromium V8 Engine contains a use-after-free vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Zoho Desktop Central Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Zoho Desktop Central contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that could allow an attacker to execute arbitrary code in the Desktop Central MSP server.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Linux Kernel Improper Privilege Management Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Kernel/ptrace.c in Linux kernel mishandles contains an improper privilege management vulnerability that allows local users to obtain root access.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Realtek Jungle SDK Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: RealTek Jungle SDK contains multiple memory corruption vulnerabilities which can allow an attacker to perform remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Sonatype Nexus Repository Manager Incorrect Access Control Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Sonatype Nexus Repository Manager before 3.15.0 has an incorrect access control vulnerability. Exploitation allows for remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Solr DataImportHandler Code Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The optional Apache Solr module DataImportHandler contains a code injection vulnerability.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Fortinet FortiOS Arbitrary File Download
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Fortinet FortiOS "execute restore src-vis" downloads code without integrity checking, allowing an attacker to arbitrarily download files.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Embedthis GoAhead Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Embedthis GoAhead before 3.6.5 allows remote code execution if CGI is enabled and a CGI program is dynamically linked.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Red Hat JBoss Application Server Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The JBoss Application Server, shipped with Red Hat Enterprise Application Platform 5.2, allows an attacker to execute arbitrary code via crafted serialized data.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Red Hat Linux JBoss Seam 2 Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: JBoss Seam 2 (jboss-seam2), as used in JBoss Enterprise Application Platform 4.3.0 for Red Hat Linux, allows attackers to perform remote code execution. This vulnerability can only be exploited when the Java Security Manager is not properly configured.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Fuel CMS SQL Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: FUEL CMS 1.4.7 allows SQL Injection via the col parameter to /pages/items, /permissions/items, or /navigation/items.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Pi-Hole AdminLTE Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Pi-hole Web v4.3.2 (aka AdminLTE) allows Remote Code Execution by privileged dashboard users via a crafted DHCP static lease.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: MongoDB mongo-express Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: mongo-express before 0.54.0 is vulnerable to Remote Code Execution via endpoints that uses the `toBSON` method.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Log4j2 Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache Log4j2 contains a vulnerability where JNDI features do not protect against attacker-controlled JNDI-related endpoints, allowing for remote code execution.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: For all affected software assets for which updates exist, the only acceptable remediation actions are: 1) Apply updates; OR 2) remove affected assets from agency networks. Temporary mitigations using one of the measures provided at https://www.cisa.gov/uscert/ed-22-02-apache-log4j-recommended-mitigation-measures are only acceptable until updates are available.

vulnerabilities.product: Snapdragon Auto, Snapdragon Compute, Snapdragon Connectivity, Snapdragon Consumer IOT, Snapdragon Industrial IOT, Snapdragon Mobile, Snapdragon Voice & Music, Snapdragon Wearables
vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Qualcomm Multiple Chipsets Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Memory corruption due to improper check to return error when user application requests memory allocation of a huge size in Snapdragon Auto, Snapdragon Compute, Snapdragon Connectivity, Snapdragon Consumer IOT, Snapdragon Industrial IOT, Snapdragon Mobile, Snapdragon Voice & Music, Snapdragon Wearables

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: MikroTik Router OS Directory Traversal Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: MikroTik RouterOS through 6.42 allows unauthenticated remote attackers to read arbitrary files and remote authenticated attackers to write arbitrary files due to a directory traversal vulnerability in the WinBox interface.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Zoho ManageEngine ServiceDesk Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Zoho ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus before 11302 is vulnerable to authentication bypass that allows a few REST-API URLs without authentication

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache HTTP Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A crafted request uri-path can cause mod_proxy to forward the request to an origin server choosen by the remote user. This issue affects Apache HTTP Server 2.4.48 and earlier.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Zoho ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Zoho ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus before 11306, ServiceDesk Plus MSP before 10530, and SupportCenter Plus before 11014 are vulnerable to unauthenticated remote code execution

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: ExifTool Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Improper neutralization of user data in the DjVu file format in Exiftool versions 7.44 and up allows arbitrary code execution when parsing the malicious image

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Windows Win32k Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Unspecified vulnerability allows for an authenticated user to escalate privileges.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Exchange Server Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: An authenticated attacker could leverage improper validation in cmdlet arguments within Microsoft Exchange and perform remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Microsoft Excel Security Feature Bypass
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: A security feature bypass vulnerability in Microsoft Excel would allow a local user to perform arbitrary code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Accellion FTA OS Command Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Accellion FTA contains an OS command injection vulnerability exploited via a crafted POST request to various admin endpoints.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Accellion FTA OS Command Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Accellion FTA contains an OS command injection vulnerability exploited via a local web service call.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Accellion FTA SQL Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Accellion FTA contains a SQL injection vulnerability exploited via a crafted host header in a request to document_root.html.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Accellion FTA Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Accellion FTA contains a server-side request forgery (SSRF) vulnerability exploited via a crafted POST request to wmProgressstat.html.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Acrobat and Reader Heap-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Acrobat Acrobat and Reader contain a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to achieve code execution in the context of the current user.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Acrobat and Reader Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Adobe Acrobat and Reader contains a use-after-free vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to achieve code execution in the context of the current user.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe ColdFusion Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Adobe ColdFusion contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that could allow for code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe ColdFusion Unrestricted File Upload Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Adobe ColdFusion contains an unrestricted file upload vulnerability that could allow for code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Adobe Flash Player Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Adobe Flash Player contains a use-after-free vulnerability that could allow for code execution.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: The impacted product is end-of-life and should be disconnected if still in use.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Amcrest Cameras and NVR Stack-based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Amcrest cameras and NVR contain a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability through port 37777 that allows an unauthenticated, remote attacker to crash the device and possibly execute code.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Android Kernel Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Android Kernel contains a use-after-free vulnerability in binder.c that allows for privilege escalation from an application to the Linux Kernel. This vulnerability was observed chained with CVE-2020-0041 and CVE-2020-0069 under exploit chain "AbstractEmu."

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Android Kernel Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Android Kernel binder_transaction of binder.c contains an out-of-bounds write vulnerability due to an incorrect bounds check that could allow for local privilege escalation. This vulnerability was observed chained with CVE-2019-2215 and CVE-2020-0069 under exploit chain "AbstractEmu."

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Mediatek Multiple Chipsets Insufficient Input Validation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Multiple MediaTek chipsets contain an insufficient input validation vulnerability and have missing SELinux restrictions in the Command Queue drivers ioctl handlers. This causes an out-of-bounds write leading to privilege escalation. This vulnerability was observed chained with CVE-2019-2215 and CVE-2020-0041 under exploit chain "AbstractEmu."

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Struts Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache Struts REST Plugin uses an XStreamHandler with an instance of XStream for deserialization without any type filtering, which can lead to remote code execution when deserializing XML payloads.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache HTTP Server Path Traversal Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache HTTP Server contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows an attacker to perform remote code execution if files outside directories configured by Alias-like directives are not under default require all denied or if CGI scripts are enabled. This CVE ID resolves an incomplete patch for CVE-2021-41773.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache HTTP Server Path Traversal Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache HTTP Server contains a path traversal vulnerability that allows an attacker to perform remote code execution if files outside directories configured by Alias-like directives are not under default �require all denied� or if CGI scripts are enabled. The original patch issued under this CVE ID is insufficient, please review remediation information under CVE-2021-42013.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache HTTP Server Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache HTTP Server, with MPM event, worker or prefork, code executing in less-privileged child processes or threads (including scripts executed by an in-process scripting interpreter) could execute code with the privileges of the parent process (usually root) by manipulating the scoreboard.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Shiro Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache Shiro contains a vulnerability which may allow remote attackers to execute code or bypass intended access restrictions via an unspecified request parameter when a cipher key has not been configured for the "remember me" feature.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Solr VelocityResponseWriter Plug-In Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: The Apache Solr VelocityResponseWriter plug-in contains an unspecified vulnerability which can allow for remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Struts Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Forced Object-Graph Navigation Language (OGNL) evaluation in Apache Struts, when evaluated on raw user input in tag attributes, can lead to remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Struts Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache Struts Jakarta Multipart parser allows for malicious file upload using the Content-Type value, leading to remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apache Struts Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apache Struts contains a vulnerability that allows for remote code execution under two circumstances. One, where the alwaysSelectFullNamespace option is true and the value isn't set for a result defined in underlying configurations and in same time, its upper package configuration have no or wildcard namespace.  Or, using URL tag which doesn't have value and action set and in same time, its upper package configuration have no or wildcard namespace.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and macOS WebKit contain a use-after-free vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple iOS and macOS Group Facetime Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS and macOS Group FaceTime contains an unspecified vulnerability where the call initiator can cause the recipient's Apple device to answer unknowingly or without user interaction.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple Multiple Products Integer Overflow Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and watchOS CoreGraphics contain an integer overflow vulnerability which may allow code execution when processing a maliciously crafted PDF. The vulnerability is also known under the moniker of FORCEDENTRY.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple Multiple Products Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and watchOS FontParser contain a memory corruption vulnerability which may allow for code execution when processing maliciously crafted front.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple Multiple Products Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and watchOS IOMobileFrameBuffer contain a memory corruption vulnerability which may allow an application to execute code with kernel privileges.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple Multiple Products Memory Initialization Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and watchOS contain a memory initialization vulnerability that may allow a malicious application to disclose kernel memory.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple Multiple Products Type Confusion Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and watchOS contain a type confusion vulnerability that may allow a malicious application to execute code with kernel privileges.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and watchOS Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and watchOS Mail contains an out-of-bounds write vulnerability which may allow memory modification or application termination when processing a maliciously crafted mail message.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and watchOS Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and watchOS Mail contains a memory corruption vulnerability that may allow heap corruption when processing a maliciously crafted mail message.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple iOS WebKit Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS WebKit contains a use-after-free vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple Multiple Products Race Condition Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOs, macOS, watchOS, and tvOS contain a race condition vulnerability that may allow a malicious application to elevate privileges.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and macOS WebKit Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and macOS WebKit contain an unspecified logic vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to execute code. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and macOS WebKit Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and macOS WebKit contain an unspecified logic vulnerability that allows a remote attacker to execute code. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and watchOS WebKit Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and watchOS WebKit contain an unspecified vulnerability that allows for universal cross-site scripting (XSS) when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Storage Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, watchOS, and Safari WebKit Storage contain a use-after-free vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple iOS WebKit Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS WebKit contains a buffer-overflow vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple macOS Unspecified Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple macOS Transparency, Consent, and Control (TCC) contains an unspecified permissions issue which may allow a malicious application to bypass privacy preferences.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple macOS Unspecified Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple macOS contains an unspecified logic issue in System Preferences that may allow a malicious application to bypass Gatekeeper checks.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS, and tvOS WebKit contain a memory corruption vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple Multiple Products WebKit Integer Overflow Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, tvOS, and Safari WebKit contain an integer overflow vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple iOS WebKit Memory Corruption Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS WebKit contains a memory corruption vulnerability that leads to code execution when processing maliciously crafted web content. This vulnerability could impact HTML parsers that use WebKit, including but not limited to Apple Safari and non-Apple products which rely on WebKit for HTML processing.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and macOS Type Confusion Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, and macOS contain a type confusion vulnerability in the XNU which may allow a malicious application to execute code with kernel privileges.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Apple Multiple Products Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Apple iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS, and tvOS contain an unspecified vulnerability that may allow an application to execute code with kernel privileges.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Arcadyan Buffalo Firmware Path Traversal Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Arcadyan Buffalo firmware contains a path traversal vulnerability that could allow unauthenticated, remote attackers to bypass authentication and access sensitive information. This vulnerability affects multiple routers across several different vendors.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Arm Trusted Firmware Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Arm Trusted Firmware contains an out-of-bounds write vulnerability allowing the non-secure (NS) world to trigger a system halt, overwrite secure data, or print out secure data when calling secure functions under the non-secure processing environment (NSPE) handler mode. This vulnerability affects Yealink Device Management servers.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Arm Mali Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) Unspecified Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Arm Mali Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) kernel driver contains an unspecified vulnerability that may allow a non-privileged user to gain write access to read-only memory, gain root privilege, corrupt memory, and modify the memory of other processes.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Arm Mali Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) Use-After-Free Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Arm Mali Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) kernel driver contains a use-after-free vulnerability that may allow a non-privileged user to make improper operations on GPU memory to gain root privilege, and/or disclose information.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Atlassian Confluence Server and Data Center Path Traversal Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Atlassian Confluence Server and Data Center contain a path traversal vulnerability in the downloadallattachments resource that may allow a privileged, remote attacker to write files. Exploitation can lead to remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Atlassian Confluence Server and Data Center Object-Graph Navigation Language (OGNL) Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Atlassian Confluence Server and Data Server contain an Object-Graph Navigation Language (OGNL) injection vulnerability that may allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute code.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Atlassian Crowd and Crowd Data Center Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Atlassian Crowd and Crowd Data Center contain a remote code execution vulnerability resulting from a pdkinstall development plugin being incorrectly enabled in release builds.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Atlassian Confluence Server and Data Center Server-Side Template Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Atlassian Confluence Server and Data Center contain a server-side template injection vulnerability that may allow an attacker to achieve path traversal and remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: BQE BillQuick Web Suite SQL Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: BQE BillQuick Web Suite contains an SQL injection vulnerability when accessing the username parameter that may allow for unauthenticated, remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.product: Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) and Firepower Threat Defense (FTD)
vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco ASA and FTD Read-Only Path Traversal Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Cisco Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) and Firepower Threat Defense (FTD) contain an improper input validation vulnerability when HTTP requests process URLs.  An attacker could exploit this vulnerability by sending a crafted HTTP request containing directory traversal character sequences to an affected device. A successful exploit could allow the attacker to view arbitrary files within the web services file system on the targeted device.

vulnerabilities.product: Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) and Firepower Threat Defense (FTD)
vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco ASA and FTD Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Cisco Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) and Firepower Threat Defense (FTD) contain an insufficient input validation vulnerability for user-supplied input by the web services interface.  Successful exploitation could allow an attacker to perform cross-site scripting (XSS) in the context of the interface or access sensitive browser-based information.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco HyperFlex HX Installer Virtual Machine Command Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Cisco HyperFlex HX Installer Virtual Machine contains an insufficient input validation vulnerability which could allow an attacker to execute commands on an affected device as the root user.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco HyperFlex HX Data Platform Command Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Cisco HyperFlex HX Installer Virtual Machine contains an insufficient input validation vulnerability which could allow an attacker to execute commands on an affected device as the tomcat8 user.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS and IOS XE Software Smart Install Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Cisco IOS and IOS XE Software improperly validates packet data, allowing an unauthenticated, remote attacker to trigger a reload of an affected device, cause a denial-of-service (DoS) condition, or perform code execution on the affected device.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS XR Software Discovery Protocol Format String Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Cisco IOS XR improperly validates string input from certain fields in Cisco Discovery Protocol messages. Exploitation could allow an unauthenticated, adjacent attacker to execute code with administrative privileges or cause a reload on an affected device.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS XR Software DVMRP Memory Exhaustion Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Cisco IOS XR Distance Vector Multicast Routing Protocol (DVMRP) incorrectly handles Internet Group Management Protocol (IGMP) packets. Exploitation could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to immediately crash the IGMP process or make it consume available memory and eventually crash.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IOS XR Software DVMRP Memory Exhaustion Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Cisco IOS XR Distance Vector Multicast Routing Protocol (DVMRP) incorrectly handles Internet Group Management Protocol (IGMP) packets. Exploitation could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to immediately crash the IGMP process or make it consume available memory and eventually crash.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco IP Phones Web Server Remote Code Execution and Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Cisco IP Phones contain an improper input validation vulnerability for HTTP requests. Exploitation could allow an attacker to execute code remotely with root privileges or cause a denial-of-service (DoS) condition.

vulnerabilities.product: Small Business RV320 and RV325 Routers
vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco Small Business RV320 and RV325 Routers Information Disclosure Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Cisco Small Business RV320 and RV325 Dual Gigabit WAN VPN Routers contain improper access controls for URLs. Exploitation could allow an attacker to download the router configuration or detailed diagnostic information.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Cisco Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) Denial-of-Service Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Cisco Adaptive Security Appliance (ASA) contains an improper input validation vulnerability with HTTP URLs. Exploitation could allow an attacker to cause a denial-of-service (DoS) condition or information disclosure.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Citrix StoreFront Server XML External Entity (XXE) Processing Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Citrix StoreFront Server contains an XML External Entity (XXE) processing vulnerability that may allow an unauthenticated attacker to retrieve potentially sensitive information.

vulnerabilities.product: Application Delivery Controller (ADC), Gateway, and SD-WAN WANOP Appliance
vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Citrix ADC, Gateway, and SD-WAN WANOP Appliance Authorization Bypass Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Citrix ADC, Citrix Gateway, and multiple Citrix SD-WAN WANOP appliance models contain an authorization bypass vulnerability that may allow unauthenticated access to certain URL endpoints. The attacker must have access to the NetScaler IP (NSIP) in order to perform exploitation.

vulnerabilities.product: Application Delivery Controller (ADC), Gateway, and SD-WAN WANOP Appliance
vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Citrix ADC, Gateway, and SD-WAN WANOP Appliance Information Disclosure Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Citrix ADC, Citrix Gateway, and multiple Citrix SD-WAN WANOP appliance models contain an information disclosure vulnerability.

vulnerabilities.product: Application Delivery Controller (ADC), Gateway, and SD-WAN WANOP Appliance
vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Citrix ADC, Gateway, and SD-WAN WANOP Appliance Information Disclosure Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Citrix ADC, Citrix Gateway, and multiple Citrix SD-WAN WANOP appliance models contain an information disclosure vulnerability.

vulnerabilities.product: Application Delivery Controller (ADC), Gateway, and SD-WAN WANOP Appliance
vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Citrix ADC, Gateway, and SD-WAN WANOP Appliance Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Citrix ADC, Citrix Gateway, and multiple Citrix SD-WAN WANOP appliance models contain an unspecified vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to perform code execution.

vulnerabilities.product: Workspace Application and Receiver for Windows
vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Citrix Workspace Application and Receiver for Windows Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Citrix Workspace Application and Receiver for Windows contains remote code execution vulnerability resulting from local drive access preferences not being enforced into the clients' local drives.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: D-Link DIR-825 R1 Devices Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: D-Link DIR-825 R1 devices contain a buffer overflow vulnerability in the web interface that may allow for remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: D-Link DNS-320 Device Command Injection Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: D-Link DNS-320 device contains a command injection vulnerability in the sytem_mgr.cgi component that may allow for remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: DotNetNuke (DNN) Inadequate Encryption Strength Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: DotNetNuke (DNN) contains an inadequate encryption strength vulnerability resulting from the use of a weak encryption algorithm to protect input parameters.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: DotNetNuke (DNN) Inadequate Encryption Strength Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: DotNetNuke (DNN) contains an inadequate encryption strength vulnerability resulting from the use of a weak encryption algorithm to protect input parameters. This CVE ID resolves an incomplete patch for CVE-2018-15811.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: DotNetNuke (DNN) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: DotNetNuke (DNN) contains a vulnerability that may allow for remote code execution via cookie deserialization.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Docker Desktop Community Edition Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Docker Desktop Community Edition contains a vulnerability that may allow local users to escalate privileges by placing a trojan horse docker-credential-wincred.exe file in %PROGRAMDATA%\DockerDesktop\version-bin\.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Multiple DrayTek Vigor Routers Web Management Page Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: DrayTek Vigor3900, Vigor2960, and Vigor300B routers contain an unspecified vulnerability that allows for remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Drupal Core Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Drupal Core contains a remote code execution vulnerability that could allow an attacker to exploit multiple attack vectors on a Drupal site, resulting in complete site compromise.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: GitLab Community and Enterprise Editions Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: GitHub Community and Enterprise Editions that utilize the ability to upload images through GitLab Workhorse are vulnerable to remote code execution. Workhorse passes image file extensions through ExifTool, which improperly validates the image files.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Exim Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Exim contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the base64d function part of the SMTP listener that may allow for remote code execution.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: EyesOfNetwork Use of Hard-Coded Credentials Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: EyesOfNetwork contains a use of hard-coded credentials vulnerability, as it uses the same API key by default. Exploitation allows an attacker to calculate or guess the admin access token.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: EyesOfNetwork Improper Privilege Management Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: EyesOfNetwork contains an improper privilege management vulnerability that may allow a user to run commands as root via a crafted Nmap Scripting Engine (NSE) script to nmap7.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: F5 BIG-IP Traffic Management User Interface (TMUI) Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: F5 BIG-IP Traffic Management User Interface (TMUI) contains a remote code execution vulnerability in undisclosed pages.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: F5 BIG-IP and BIG-IQ Centralized Management iControl REST Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: F5 BIG-IP and BIG-IQ Centralized Management contain a remote code execution vulnerability in the iControl REST interface that allows unauthenticated attackers with network access to execute system commands, create or delete files, and disable services.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: ForgeRock Access Management (AM) Core Server Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: ForgeRock Access Management (AM) Core Server allows an attacker who sends a specially crafted HTTP request to one of three endpoints (/ccversion/Version, /ccversion/Masthead, or /ccversion/ButtonFrame) to execute code in the context of the current user (unless ForgeRock AM is running as root user, which the vendor does not recommend).

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Fortinet FortiOS Default Configuration Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Fortinet FortiOS contains a default configuration vulnerability that may allow an unauthenticated attacker on the same subnet to intercept sensitive information by impersonating the Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP) server.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Fortinet FortiOS SSL VPN Improper Authentication Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Fortinet FortiOS SSL VPN contains an improper authentication vulnerability that may allow a user to login successfully without being prompted for the second factor of authentication (FortiToken) if they change the case in their username.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Fortinet FortiOS SSL VPN Path Traversal Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Fortinet FortiOS SSL VPN web portal contains a path traversal vulnerability that may allow an unauthenticated attacker to download FortiOS system files through specially crafted HTTP resource requests.
